title: 150pc Assorted Wall Plugs – 8mm, 7mm, 6mm, 5mm Sizes for Versatile DIY Fixings | Suitable for Brick, Block, Concrete & General Masonry (150pc - Assorted Plugs)
features: A comprehensive selection of 8MM, 7MM, 6MM AND 5MM wall plugs, giving you the flexibility to match the correct fixing to the screw and material every time. Ideal for everything from small decorative fittings to more substantial mounting jobs

Suitable for general repairs, decorating projects, home improvement tasks and light trade work. Whether you’re hanging pictures, fitting shelves, installing brackets or carrying out routine maintenance, this set provides a dependable solution

Each plug is engineered to expand reliably when a screw is driven in, creating a firm, stable grip within solid walls. Designed to minimise slipping, spinning or loosening, ensuring your fixings remain steady over time

Supplied in a clear, easy-to-store bag, allowing you to quickly see all sizes at a glance. Although supplied loose, the bag keeps everything together and makes it simple to grab the size you need while working

A convenient, ready-to-use selection that covers a broad range of household, workshop and on-site tasks. Ideal for DIY enthusiasts, decorators, maintenance workers and tradespeople looking for a reliable set of everyday fixings
description: This 150-piece assorted wall plug set offers a versatile, reliable selection of fixings designed to support a broad range of everyday household and light trade tasks. Containing a balanced mix of 8mm, 7mm, 6mm and 5mm plugs, it provides the flexibility needed for everything from small decorative fittings to more demanding jobs where a stronger anchoring point is required. Whether you’re hanging picture frames, putting up mirrors, securing shelving, positioning curtain poles, installing brackets or carrying out general DIY improvements, you’ll always have the right size to hand. Each plug is engineered for use in masonry, brick, blockwork and concrete, expanding firmly when a screw is driven in to create a dependable, steady hold that resists loosening over time. The clearly assorted layout makes selecting the correct size quick and intuitive, reducing guesswork and helping you work more efficiently. This set is ideal for homeowners, decorators, DIY enthusiasts, maintenance workers and tradespeople who want a convenient, ready-to-use collection of fixings that covers the most commonly used sizes. Whether kept in a toolbox, workshop or garage, these plugs provide a practical, go-to solution for everyday repairs, improvements and installation tasks around the home or workplace.
